title: Vikings and Camps: Medieval Structures
description: Immersive set of viking-themed structures and enemies, ready to be found in your world!
body:
![Vikings and Camps](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Vikings_n_Camps/BH_VNC_Header.webp)
Vikings N Camps, adds 8 new viking-style structures and a new enemy with 4 variations: The viking. They can spawn both at night (rarely) and in camps or outposts. Vikings drop both their equipment and leather or iron.

![Structures](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Vikings_n_Camps/BH_VNC_Structures.webp)

- Small viking tent - Nothing more than a small tent, there might be some vikings in it, better look out!

- Small camp with palisade wall - A small viking camp - Don't just run inside. It's usually filled with warriors.

- Outpost - A small outpost with a tower, 2 tents and some enemies, too

- Viking hut - Perfect for those, who prefer fighting over staying at home and don't need a huge manor

- Small viking house - Rather a small hut, but still cozy!

- Small viking house with stray roof - Classical viking house!

- Big viking house - A big manor for the wildest and most powerful vikings. Might be fitting for you!

- The Beacon - sends a huge signal that can be seen over a long distance.

![Enemies](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Vikings_n_Camps/BH_VNC_Enemies.webp)

The Viking

Health: 25

Equipment: Iron axe or viking sword

Drops: Raw iron, iron ingots, leather and sometimes their equipment

Vikings can spawn both at night and in viking camps or outposts. They hunt down villagers whenever they're able to.

![Weapons](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Vikings_n_Camps/BH_VNC_Weapons.webp)

Viking Sword

Damage: 5

Durability: 224

Viking Swords have much thinner blades than a normal blade. You can obtain them through trading with villagers or killing vikings.



Viking Axe


Damage: 5.2

Durability: 300

Viking Axes have thinner blades and they're more light than a common axe, thus allowing for quicker strikes and better precision.



For now, this is it. Please note that the main purpose of this mod is to add more structures to my upcoming modpack, Tales Of Frost And Fire. However, I don't mind if you use it in your own modpack! :D
[![Click here to join our discord!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c85f9c068f7691f8eee385f09b2bd43faa78ced0.png)](https://discord.gg/79zymr8mmB)
